question.text: Within how many days from the end of the financial year must the Compliance Test Report (CTR) of an AIF be submitted?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The CTR shall be submitted within 30 days from the end of the financial year to the trustee and sponsor (for trusts) or sponsor (for other forms). **The Trap:** The trustee/sponsor has 30 days to send observations, and the manager has 15 days to respond to those observations. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Any violation observed must be intimated to SEBI as soon as possible - no specific timeline for violation reporting.
